It's great for the coolest battle aesthetic gamer outfits with how the luxury sparkly icy diamond gems glow and match the color of the mega power on the medal . The jewelry chain features solid dark black metal chains . The amulet / medallion pendant has an awsome neon pink fire / flames dragon.
